sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26187" key="diafarmakeu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διαφαρμᾰκεύω</orth>, <sense id="n26187.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">give medicine to,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τινάς</foreign> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.157c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
